_publications._publicationTitle: Capturing the wide variety of impaired fracture healing phenotypes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1 with eight key factors: a computational study.

_contextSnippet: A large sensitivity analysis using 'Design of Experiments' (DOE) identified that an impaired endochondral ossification process and an increased infiltration of fibroblastic cells are key elements
details: Used for Design of Experiments (DOE) sensitivity analysis to identify key factors for congenital pseudarthrosis development
